parameters.query: SELECT value FROM ops.poll_state WHERE key = 'agent_registry_last_merged_at';

nodes.name: Get File Content At Merge Commit

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit.agent_versions (agent_id, git_commit, content_hash, approver, raw_content)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (agent_id, content_hash) DO NOTHING
RETURNING version_id, agent_id, content_hash;
UPDATE ops.poll_state SET value = $1, updated_at = clock_timestamp() WHERE key = 'agent_registry_last_merged_at';

main.node: Get File Content At Merge Commit
